summary: Shop UI with Stripe checkout. Pre-existing components verified: ShopCatalog, ProductDetail, ProductCard, CartDrawer, AddToCartButton, cart hook. New: POST /api/shop/checkout creates Stripe Checkout sessions for one-time payments with shipping address collection. Replaced checkout placeholder with full flow: order summary, payment summary, Stripe redirect, success/cancel pages, free shipping over $75, trust signals. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
